subcodes.first_line: O my God, glorified art Thou! This is Thy servant who seeketh intercession at the wafting of the holy breezes from the sanctuary of Thy divine Oneness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی هذا عبدک الذی استشفع عند تبسم نسایم قدس سلطان احدیتک
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
